name: @nestjs-ai/mcp-common
description: Shared MCP primitives for NestJS AI

scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let dir=process.cwd();let root=null;while(true){const pkg=path.join(dir,'package.json');if(fs.existsSync(pkg)){try{const json=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(pkg,'utf8'));if(json.name==='nestjs-ai'){root=dir;break;}}catch{} }const parent=path.dirname(dir);if(parent===dir) throw new Error('Unable to locate NestJS AI repo root');dir=parent;}fs.copyFileSync(path.join(root,'README.md'),path.join(process.cwd(),'README.md'));"
